---
title: "Clustering II"
subtitle: "Gaussian mixture models"
date: "Oct 16, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Gaussian mixture models as soft clustering; the EM algorithm; model selection via BIC; comparing GMMs to k-means.

**Assigned reading:** PRML §9.1–9.2

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [slides_clean](slides_clean.pdf) | [slides_annotated](slides_annotated.pdf)

**Code:** [app1.R](code/app1.R) [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [lab1.Rmd](code/lab1.Rmd)

**Supplementary readings:** [Altman and Krzywinski (2017)](readings/Altman and Krzywinski (2017).pdf) [Garcia-Vidal et al. (2024)](readings/Garcia-Vidal et al. (2024).pdf)
